request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a possible strike from "EAV" (the public transport company of Campania (15)). IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time updates about an ongoing strike (e.g., "the metro is currently closed due to a strike"), set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGIONAL", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: Linee Vesuviane: Avviso di sciopero di 2 ore mercoledì 23 luglio 2025 - EAV srl

Linee Vesuviane: Avviso di sciopero di 2 ore mercoledì 23 luglio 2025

Data:
22 Luglio 2025

Si comunica che, ai sensi dell’art. 2 comma 7 della L.146/90 (fattispecie: gravi eventi lesivi dell’incolumità e della sicurezza dei lavoratori) e delle integrazioni alla stessa della L.83/2000 e successive modifiche, per il giorno mercoledì 23 luglio 2025 la O.S. Faisa Confail ha proclamato uno sciopero aziendale di 2 ore, dalle ore 09:00 alle ore 11:00, avente le seguenti motivazioni: sicurezza sul posto di lavoro per il personale front-line di EAV S.r.l. ( autisti, macchinisti, capitreno, gestori, capistazione, Pl e biglietterie)

Durante l’ultima proclamazione di sciopero delle citata O.S., la percentuale di adesione è stata del 2,32% (sciopero del 10/01/2025)

Di seguito vengono elencate le ultime e le prime partenze garantite in relazione alle fasce di garanzia.

Durante l’orario di sciopero, l’effettuazione delle corse è subordinata al numero di lavoratori aderenti allo sciopero.

Ultime partenze garantite prima dello sciopero

response.thoughts:
**Strike Alert: EAV (Campania, Code 15)**

Okay, here's what I've got. I've just processed data regarding a strike impacting EAV, the public transport system in the Campania region, identified by code "15". The announcement confirms a two-hour company strike, or *sciopero aziendale*, set to occur on Wednesday, July 23rd, 2025. The strike window is from 09:00 to 11:00. This is pretty straightforward. I've successfully extracted the key details: strike status is true, with start and end times clearly defined as "2025-07-23 09:00:00" and "2025-07-23 11:00:00", respectively. Since EAV operates regionally within Campania, I'm classifying the location type as "REGIONAL" and associating it with the location code "15".

The announcement mentions "first and last departures guaranteed" but doesn't actually provide specific time bands. The text says it lists guaranteed departures, but doesn't state clear time intervals for "fasce di garanzia" as is typical. Therefore, I will not include the *guaranteedTimes* in the structured data I'm assembling, as it would be incomplete. I'll stick to what is clearly presented in the source.

Here’s the structured data I'm building, ready for further processing:

```json
{
  "isStrike": true,
  "strikeData": {
    "startDate": "2025-07-23 09:00:00",
    "endDate": "2025-07-23 11:00:00",
    "locationType": "REGIONAL",
    "locationCodes": ["15"]
  }
}
```
